productDisplayName: C Vox Men Control Freak Black Jacket
description: CompositionBlack jacket made of 80% cotton and 20% polyester, has full sleeves with ribbed cuffs, two zippered pockets on the sides, mock collar, zippered front placket, branded zipper and rubber printed branding on left chest Tech Features:Built-in washable stereo speakers in collarBuilt-in washable earphone in collarBuilt-in headphone jack in inside breast pocketSwap Button to swap between speakers/earphoneMulti-purpose button to for Play/Stop(manage music) & Answer/End call (manage phone calls)Built-in microphone to speak into while on a phone callFitRegularWash careMachine wash cold at 30 degreesDo not use softeners, iron, or bleachC.Vox, the pioneer in high-tech sportswear with incorporated consumer electronics. The label fashioned this piece for the person braving the elements. Its polyester outer protects you from cold and sleet while its built-in earphones, washable microphones, audio jack and mike offers the wearer the convenience of enjoying music or taking a call in any weather, much required for today&rsquo s fast-paced lifestyle.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18&rdquo
